# didEnumerate(_:)

**Instance Method**

Provides an array of contact items to the observer.

## Declaration

```swift
func didEnumerate(_: [ContactItem])
```

## Discussion

You can call this method multiple times to fulfill the [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemContentObserver/suggestedPageSize].

## Providing contact items

- **ContactItem**: An item in the contact database.
